scripts.setup: echo 'Copy .dev.vars.example to .dev.vars and add your credentials'
scripts.check: pnpm typecheck && echo '✅ All checks passed'
scripts.rebuild: pnpm clean && pnpm install && pnpm build
scripts.health: curl -s http://localhost:8787/health | jq . || echo 'Health check failed - is dev server running?'
scripts.test:call: echo 'Open http://localhost:5173/?call=test in two browser tabs'
